name: TEMPRO
description: Predict melting temperature of nanobodies. Uses ESM2 language model embeddings. Achieves mean absolute error (MAE) or 4.03°C and root mean squared error (RMSE) of 5.66°C.
capabilities: Achieves mean absolute error (MAE) or 4.03°C and root mean squared error (RMSE) of 5.66°C

sequence.description: Nanobody amino acid sequence for melting temperature prediction
